```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement LLM evaluation and benchmarking"
---
# LLM Evaluation
## Task
Evaluate and benchmark LLM performance.
## Requirements
1. Define evaluation dimensions (accuracy, fluency, safety, helpfulness). 2. Create evaluation datasets.
3. Implement automatic evaluation metrics (BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore). 4. Implement human evaluation protocols.
5. Compare against baseline models.
## Constraints
- Use multiple metrics. Include safety evaluation. Human eval for subjective quality.
## Success Criteria
- Comprehensive evaluation across dimensions. Baselines compared. Safety validated.
```
